title: Create core/events.py - Core event definitions

changes.description: Created EventType enum, CoreEvent base class, EventEmitter mixin; re-exports JobEvent from broker/event.py for compatibility

verification.method: CoreEvent instance created with event_id, event_type, timestamp, payload

JobEvent re-exported from broker.event for compatibility

commit.message: TASK-002: 创建 core/events.py - 核心事件定义

notes: CoreEvent follows broker/event.py JobEvent pattern for consistency
